title: Page Agent Local Lab
description: Local interoperability experiment with Alibaba Page Agent — real non-demo IIFE runtime driven by a deterministic offline mock model

build_provenance.dependency_install: npm ci --ignore-scripts using the pinned upstream lockfile
build_provenance.entry: packages/page-agent/src/production-iife-entry.ts (temporary local production IIFE entry created inside the pinned upstream checkout)

integration.bundle_status: Custom non-demo IIFE bundle built locally from the pinned alibaba/page-agent source. The build used a temporary local production IIFE entry (packages/page-agent/src/production-iife-entry.ts) created inside the pinned upstream checkout, compiling the PageAgent source module (packages/page-agent/src/PageAgent.ts). It is a controlled local build output, not a published package bundle. The published demo entry (src/demo.ts, auto-init, free testing API, CDN) is excluded per experiment policy.
